summary: Phase 1 Navigation & Back Buttons Testing Complete. Verified ResponsiveHeader integration on ProfileScreen (V3) and KundliScreenSimplified (V2). All navigation features working correctly except for a CSS specificity bug with header logo size on PublicLandingPage.

ui_bugs.issue: Header logo font-size is 15px instead of 36px due to CSS specificity issue - `.landing-nav a` rule (font-size: 15px) overrides `.landing-logo` (font-size: 36px)
ui_bugs.fix_suggestion: Change `.landing-logo` to `.landing-nav .landing-logo` in CSS (line 170-177) to increase specificity, or add !important to font-size

profilescreen_v3_responsiveheader.verification: ProfileScreen.jsx lines 50-56 correctly integrates ResponsiveHeader with showBackButton={true}, onBack, onNavigate, onTabChange props

kundliscreensimplified_v2_responsivehead.verification: KundliScreenSimplified.jsx lines 142-147, 168-173, 210-216, 257-262 all use ResponsiveHeader with onNavigate and onTabChange props. showBackButton is false (correct as it's a main tab screen, not sub-page)

responsiveheader_nav_links.verification: ResponsiveHeader.jsx lines 17-22 defines NAV_ITEMS (Life topics, Experts, Remedies, Astro) with correct screen/tab mappings. handleNavClick (lines 37-51) correctly routes: scrollTo for topics-section, onTabChange for tab switches

back_buttons_on_sub_screens.verification: SimplifiedApp.jsx correctly passes onBack prop to: TopicLandingPage (line 490), ExpertProfileScreen (line 546), ProfileScreen (line 560-563). ResponsiveHeader has header-back-btn with data-testid (line 85)

see_more_life_topics_cta.verification: Button with data-testid='see-more-life-topics-btn' is visible and contains text 'See More life topics' (PublicLandingPage.jsx lines 1405-1415)

header_logo_size_responsiveheader.verification: ResponsiveHeader.jsx line 106 uses text-3xl md:text-4xl (≈30px/36px) for logo - correct per requirement

header_logo_size_publiclandingpage.verification: CSS shows 36px but computed style returns 15px due to specificity issue with .landing-nav a overriding .landing-logo

mobile_hamburger_menu.verification: Hamburger menu visible on mobile (390px), hidden on desktop (1920px). Opens correctly with 5 nav links: About, Life Topics, Our Experts, How It Works, Get a free 10 mins consultation

bottom_nav_hidden_desktop.verification: BottomNav.jsx line 36 has md:hidden class - correctly hides on desktop (≥768px)

simplifiedapp_prop_passing.verification: SimplifiedApp.jsx correctly passes onBack, onNavigate, onTabChange to all sub-screens including ProfileScreen (lines 560-565), TopicLandingPage (lines 490-494), ExpertProfileScreen (lines 546-548)

action_items: FIX: PublicLandingPage.jsx CSS - Change line 170 from `.landing-logo` to `.landing-nav .landing-logo` OR add `font-size: 36px !important` to fix header logo size
critical_code_review_comments: CSS specificity bug: .landing-nav a (font-size: 15px) at line 186-191 overrides .landing-logo (font-size: 36px) at line 170-177

success_rate.frontend: 91% (10/11 tests passed, 1 CSS specificity bug found)

test_credentials.note: Google OAuth required for authenticated screens. Public landing page tested with Playwright.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 Navigation testing complete. ProfileScreen V3 and KundliScreenSimplified V2 both have ResponsiveHeader integration. One CSS bug found: header logo on PublicLandingPage shows 15px instead of 36px due to .landing-nav a rule overriding .landing-logo. Fix by increasing CSS specificity. All back buttons, nav links, mobile menu, and bottom nav hidden on desktop are working correctly.
